groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #4.

sentences.text: Every weekend the family gathered to watch the clownfish swim circles in their living room tank.

Every weekend the family gathered to watch the clownfish swim circles in their living room tank. The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting.

Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window.
